subject: Re: Annual Partnership Proposal Confirmation
body:
Ms. Wang Fang,

Thank you for your trust. After discussion, our annual partnership proposal is as follows:
1. Standard edition annual fee at 20% discount, i.e., 96,000 CNY/year (original price 120,000)
2. Complimentary 3-month premium edition trial
3. 2 free on-site training sessions
4. Technical support response time commitment of within 4 hours

Please feel free to contact us with any questions.

Zhang Wei
Sales Manager

subject: Exclusive Offer for Precision Manufacturing
body:
Mr. Liu Wei,

Based on our discussion, here is the exclusive proposal for your company:
1. First-year contract price of 65,000 CNY (standard price 80,000)
2. Complimentary anomaly detection premium module (valued at 20,000)
3. Free data migration service
4. Priority technical support channel

Please confirm and I will arrange the contract.

Zhang Wei

subject: Nova Retail Partnership Proposal
body:
Mr. Chen Yu,

We are glad to have reached a preliminary agreement. The proposal is as follows:
1. Enterprise edition annual fee of 150,000 CNY (no discount)
2. Includes data analytics and natural language query modules
3. API integration support provided
4. 7x24 technical support

Li Ming
Senior Sales Consultant

subject: Quarterly Team Building Activity Notice
body: Hello everyone, the quarterly team building activity is scheduled for April 10.
